title: Personal Origins
description: This is an origins addon that adds 15 new origns
body:
This mod requires Fabric API, Origins and Pehkui to properly work.
I am currently trying to recover older versions, but that might require some work since my hard drive recently broke.

Fencer: 2/3

+ Has a dash

+ Has faster attack speed

- Vegetarian

- Light armor

 

Berserker: 3/3

+ Has triple attack damage

+ Has a dash

+ Doesn't take any knockback

- Carnivore

- Can wear only diamond and netherite armor

- Cant hold a shield up

 

Builder: 2/3

+ Can toggle levitation

+ Doesn't take any fall damage

- Has permanent pink glowing (The pink is for fun)

- seven hearts

 

Grinder: 3/3

+ Has permanent haste and speed

+ Has nine extra inventory slots

- Cant sleep

- Gets extra extra exhausted

 

Spikeling: 2/3

+ Can shoot a powerful projectile

+ Goes invisible when he sneaks (Armor is invisible as well)

-  Has slightly more exhaustion

- Can't wear iron, diamond and netherite

 

Stoneling: 3/3

+ Is fireproof

+ Gets stronger in lava

+ Has natural armor

+ Is immune to poison

+ Can mine stone with his hand

- Cant eat anything but cobblestone

- Sinks in water

- Has permanent slowness

 

Undergroundling: 3/3

+ Gets boosts if nearby ANY deepslate block

+ Can mine stone with his hand

+ Has night vision

- Burns in daylight

- Carnivore

 

Phoenix: 3/3

+ Regeneration in fire

+ Inflicts fire on hit

+ Dash

- Water damage

- Carnivore

- Only diamond and netherite armor

- Weakness at night

 

Miner: 2/3

+ Has permanent haste

+ Can mine stone with his hands

- Gets exhausted faster

- Has seven hearts

 

Onderkruipsel: 2/3

+ Can climb blocks

+ Has a dash

+ Doesn't have to eat that much

- Is small

- Dash Consumes a lot of hunger

- Can't sleep

 

 Thunderling: 3/3

+Can summon thunderstorm every 20 minutes

+ Inflicts lightning on hit every 30 seconds

+ Gets speed, strenght and regen in storm

- Takes tripple fire damage

- Takes damage in the nether, no way to pass that

 

 

Firnoma 3/3 

+ Is immune to fire

+ Has a dash when a carved pumpkin is equipped

- Takes water damage

-  Takes damage in the overworld with the pumpkin equipped

- Has weakness without pumpkin

- Cant wear gold and leather armor

 

Fissender 3/3

+Able to teleport to where they can see

+Is faster in water

+Gets less hungry than normal entities

-Tall

-Fire does twice as much damage

-Carnivore

 

Angletian

+Can stay underwater without drowning

+Has nightvision underwater

+Is faster underwater 

-Vegetarian

- Drowns in air

 

Dryad 2/3

+ Deals a lot amount of poison damage

+ Can levitate every 20 seconds

+ Can let plants grow by rightclicking them

+ breaks vegetation and stone faster

+- Has permanent slowfalling

- Has 7 hearts

- cant do normal hit damage
